_fixture_meta.purpose: Placeholder for a real Vapi end-of-call-report webhook payload.
replace: message.call.id          → real provider_call_id (same as the preceding status-update)
message.transcript       → real call transcript (can be empty string)
message.recordingUrl     → real recording URL or null
message.cost             → real call cost in USD
factory_delta: call.orgId          — NOT present in factory buildVapiEndOfCallReport
durationMinutes     — NOT present in factory (only durationSeconds is built by factory)
recordingUrl        — NOT present in factory (factory has no recording fields)
cost / costBreakdown — NOT present in factory
analysis            — NOT present in factory (structured evaluation fields)
messages            — NOT present in factory (per-turn transcript messages)

message.summary: The caller asked about opening hours. The agent provided the information.
message.transcript:
Agent: Hello, how can I help you today?
Caller: What are your opening hours?
Agent: We are open Monday to Friday from 9am to 6pm.

analysis.summary: Customer inquiry about opening hours resolved successfully.

messages.message: Hello, how can I help you today?
